title: CRE Terminology & Key Metrics
subtitle: The vocabulary and formulas every CRE investor must know cold
description: A hands-on tour of the CRE metrics that drive every deal: cap rate, NOI, DSCR, LTV, cash-on-cash, IRR, equity multiple, and more. You'll learn not just the formulas but when each metric matters, how they relate to each other, and the pitfalls that trip up new investors.
outcomes: Calculate and interpret cap rate, NOI, GRM, DSCR, LTV, and loan constant
Distinguish between cash-on-cash return, IRR, and equity multiple — and know when to use each
Read a broker's offering memorandum (OM) and spot inflated numbers
Understand how operating expenses flow from gross income to NOI
Apply each metric to a real example NNN deal from start to finish
